result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 17:          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) ...
                                                   ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner'
  ) a
  GROUP BY agent_id
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases e
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_cnt > 1
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM filtered_agents
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner'
  ) a
  GROUP BY agent_id
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases e
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_cnt > 1
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM filtered_agents
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner'
  ) a
  GROUP BY agent_id
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases e
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_cnt > 1
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM filtered_agents
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c='Owner'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases e
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_cnt > 1
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM filtered_agents
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c='Owner'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds

  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, MIN(handle_seconds) AS min_h, MAX(handle_seconds) AS max_h
FROM eligible_cases;

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS assignment_time,
    ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c) AS assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), first_owner AS (
  SELECT case_id, owner_id AS first_owner_id, assignment_count
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE rn = 1
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         f.first_owner_id AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN first_owner f ON f.case_id = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
    AND f.assignment_count = 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
), filtered_agents AS (
  SELECT e.agent_id,
         AVG(e.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases e
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = e.agent_id
  WHERE acc.case_cnt > 1
  GROUP BY e.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM filtered_agents
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
